name: DEFECT / DAMAGED PACKAGE - CLEARANCE: Reflex Plus Adult Dog Food Canned - Lamb Chunks inGravy 400g
shortDescription: Give your pet the taste of real lamb with Bonnie Adult Dog Food in a rich, balanced formula that supports energy, hydration, and long-term health for all adult breeds.
description: Reflex Plus Lamb Adult Dog Canned Food , fully-balanced, chicken protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) -?7.0 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 4.0 Crude Fiber (%) -?0.5 Moisture (%) -?80 Crude Ash (%) - 2.5 Vitamin A (Min) -?1600 IE/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) -?240 IE/kg Iron -?10 mg/kg Copper -?1.9 mg/kg Iodine -?0.4 mg/kg Manganese -?1.4 mg/kg Zinc - 21.0 mg/kg Selenium -?0.024 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat & Animal Derivatives (Lamb 4% min.), Cereals, Minerals, Colourants. MINERALS: ?Iron, Copper, Iodine, Manganese, Zinc, Selenium VITAMINS: ??Vit.?A,?Vit. D FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: See table below. Individual necessity depends on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. DOG SIZE (Cans per meal) Toy ( Small (5 -10 kg): 1 - 2 cans Medium (10 - 20 kg): 2 - 3 cans Large (20 - 35 kg): 3 - 5 cans
